section: Additional Data Pertinent to a Solid-Solvent Extraction of Rare-Earth Poisons
text: To determine whether trace amounts of rare-earth fluorides would behave as predicted, a polythermal experiment was carried out in which solid $\mathsf{CeF}_3$ (unlabeled) was added in two increments to LiF $\mathsf{BeF}_2$ -UF $_4$ (62.8-36.4-0.8 mole %) in which was dissolved 0.0795 wt % $\mathsf{SmF}_3$ (tracer labeled).
